description_long: This is a medium-sized mammal with a robust, elongated body and a distinctive long, downward-curving snout. Its fur is short and appears to be a gradient of brown shades, with lighter tones on the chest and underbelly and darker hues along the back and limbs. The forelimbs are slightly outstretched and end in clawed digits, while the hind legs are sturdy and support the animal in an upright posture. The head is small relative to the body, with small, rounded ears and no visible tail. The overall form and coloration suggest an animal adapted for digging or foraging, likely an anteater. The surface appears matte and soft, with a naturalistic, slightly rough texture.
description: A brown, robust mammal with a long, curved snout and short fur, standing upright with outstretched forelimbs. The animal has a matte, slightly rough surface and clawed digits.
description_view_0: Front view showing the animal's broad chest, outstretched forelimbs, and the lighter fur on its underbelly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated, curved snout and the animal's upright, slightly arched posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, darker fur coloration, and the rounded shape of the body and head.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the snout profile and the animal's sturdy, upright stance.
